name: Klavis AI MCP Server (Strata)
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Klavis AI (Klavis-AI org) for the Klavis platform — an MCP integration and deployment service. Enables progressive tool usage at any scale, providing a managed way to deploy and orchestrate MCP tools across different AI agents. Klavis.ai offers hosted MCP server infrastructure for teams building agent applications.
use_cases: Deploying and managing MCP tools at scale through Klavis's managed infrastructure
Progressive tool capability exposure to AI agents based on context
Teams building multi-agent systems needing centralized MCP tool management
Organizations wanting managed MCP hosting without self-hosting infrastructure
not_for: Teams that self-host all MCP servers (Klavis adds managed layer on top)
Simple single-agent workflows not requiring multi-tool orchestration
Teams comfortable managing MCP servers directly
best_when: A team building production AI agent applications wants managed MCP infrastructure — centralized tool deployment, versioning, and progressive capability exposure without managing their own server infrastructure.
avoid_when: You're building simple agent workflows or prefer to control your own MCP server hosting. Klavis adds value at scale, not for small single-agent setups.

auth.notes: Klavis API key required. Sign up at klavis.ai for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier for development; check klavis.ai for current limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Production plans for higher volume and enterprise features
pricing.notes: Startup-stage managed MCP platform. Pricing evolving — check klavis.ai for current tiers.

known_agent_gotchas: Early-stage startup — API and tooling may evolve rapidly; pin versions
Managed infrastructure means tool availability depends on Klavis uptime
Progressive tool exposure concept is novel — test thoroughly before production reliance
Official from Klavis-AI org — actively developed MCP platform startup
agent_readiness.security_notes: Tool orchestration data flows through Klavis infrastructure. API key auth. HTTPS. Startup — verify data handling policies before production use with sensitive tool invocations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Managed MCP platform. Tool invocations may pass through Klavis servers. API key auth. Verify data handling for production use.
